name: Wright Law Offices: Phoenix Bankruptcy Attorney
description_short: Phoenix-based bankruptcy law firm specializing in Chapter 7, 13, and 11 filings with 10+ years of experience. Offers free consultations and handles foreclosure, repossession, and debt settlement cases.
description_long:
Wright Law Offices is a bankruptcy-focused legal practice based in Phoenix and Scottsdale, Arizona, founded by Attorney Benjamin Wright. The firm positions itself as a specialized bankruptcy provider rather than a general practice law firm, with bankruptcy as their sole area of practice. Attorney Wright brings an accounting background (University of Wisconsin degree) and over 10 years of bankruptcy experience, having helped over 1,000 clients successfully file.

The firm offers comprehensive bankruptcy services across multiple chapters (7, 11, and 13), plus complementary debt management solutions including debt settlement, loan modifications, and short sales. They also handle specialized bankruptcy situations such as student loans, tax debts, medical bills, and auto/mortgage loan bankruptcies. Additional services include foreclosure prevention, repossession stopping, and creditor harassment cessation. All new clients meet directly with an attorney during their initial consultation, and the firm maintains 24/7 live call answering.

The firm distinguishes itself through deliberate positioning as a small, quality-focused practice rather than a high-volume operation. They explicitly reject high-visibility marketing (no billboards or transit advertising), instead relying on referrals from other attorneys and previous clients. The accounting background of Attorney Wright is highlighted as a differentiator for analyzing complex financial documents. Client testimonials emphasize personal attention, reasonable fees, prompt communication, and the willingness to accommodate scheduling around client needs.

While the website content is compelling and client reviews are positive, potential clients should note that this is a single-attorney firm with limited public information about team size, credentials beyond Attorney Wright, or specific fee structures. The firm's strength lies in focused expertise and personalized service rather than institutional resources or extensive marketing.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Attorney Wright has 10+ years of bankruptcy experience and has successfully helped over 1,000 clients file
Attorney brings accounting degree from University of Wisconsin, useful for analyzing complex financial documents
All new clients meet directly with an attorney during first consultation, not with paralegals or intake staff
Maintains 24/7 live call answering—clients reach real people, not automated systems
Receives frequent referrals from other lawyers, indicating strong professional reputation
Handles specialized bankruptcy situations including student loans, tax debts, and medical bills
Multiple positive client reviews cite reasonable fees, prompt communication, and personal attention
cons: Limited public information about firm size, staffing, or credentials of team members beyond Attorney Wright
Specific fee structure not disclosed on website; clients must call for pricing
Single-attorney firm may limit availability or capacity during high-demand periods
No information provided about bankruptcy filing success rates, dismissal rates, or outcomes data
Geographic service area appears limited to Arizona (Phoenix/Scottsdale area and surrounding regions)
best_for: Arizona residents facing Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy who prefer direct attorney consultation and personalized service
Homeowners seeking foreclosure prevention or those facing repossession who want legal guidance from an accounting-trained attorney
Small business owners considering Chapter 11 bankruptcy or business debt restructuring
Individuals with complex financial situations involving tax debts, student loans, or medical bills bundled with personal bankruptcy
diagnosis: Best for Arizona residents needing bankruptcy protection or debt relief who value direct attorney access and personalized service over high-volume processing. The main caveat is that this is a small, single-attorney practice with limited scalability and no published outcome metrics, so clients should verify capacity and specific fee arrangements before committing.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
